feed.title: The Ocean Mixing and Acoustics Lab
feed.subtitle: We study fine-scale ocean structure, turbulence, and stratification to understand transport, mixing, and acoustic variability.

entry.title: Joining UH Mānoa as Assistant Professor

link.title: Joining UH Mānoa as Assistant Professor

entry.content:
I am thrilled to join the Department of Oceanography at the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa as an Assistant Professor starting August 2025.

I will be building the Ocean Mixing and Acoustics Lab, where we will study fine-scale ocean structure, turbulence, and the connection between ocean physics and acoustics.

I am actively recruiting PhD and Master’s students — if you are interested, please visit the students page for more information.
entry.summary: Excited to start a new chapter at the Department of Oceanography, SOEST.

entry.title: No, I Haven’t Published Yet
entry.summary: On the pressure to publish and what it means to be a scientist in progress.
